WITH cm AS (
  SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency, ym.Date, ym.Consumption
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
),
 totals AS (
  SELECT CustomerID, Segment, SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM cm
  GROUP BY CustomerID, Segment
),
 min_totals AS (
  SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
  FROM totals
  GROUP BY Segment
),
 lowest AS (
  SELECT t.Segment, t.total_consumption
  FROM totals t
  JOIN min_totals m ON t.Segment = m.Segment AND t.total_consumption = m.min_total
),
 avg_lowest AS (
  SELECT Segment, SUM(total_consumption) / COUNT(*) AS avg_consumption
  FROM lowest
  GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_lowest WHERE Segment='SME') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_lowest WHERE Segment='LAM') AS SME_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_lowest WHERE Segment='LAM') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_lowest WHERE Segment='KAM') AS LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_lowest WHERE Segment='KAM') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_lowest WHERE Segment='SME') AS KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH perc AS (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption END) AS cons2013,
         SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN ym.Consumption END) AS cons2012,
         ((SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption END) - SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN ym.Consumption END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption END)) * 100 AS pct
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
  GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT Segment, pct FROM perc ORDER BY pct DESC LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct FROM perc ORDER BY pct ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
